note: Manually curated. Activate auto-update via .github/workflows/fetch-reviews.yml once GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY and GOOGLE_PLACE_ID secrets are set in the repo.

reviews.author: Natalie Burns
reviews.text: My eyes feel wide awake, uplifted and bright, instead of heavy and tired looking. Fantastic treatment — highly recommended.

reviews.author: Verified Client
reviews.text: I have had anti-wrinkle injections, filler and semi-permanent makeup from Sam and I wouldn't trust anyone else with my face. Incredibly professional with a wonderful warm manner.

reviews.author: Claire Corrigan
reviews.text: Sam is extremely professional and makes you feel at ease. She is a perfectionist and goes above and beyond to ensure you get the results you want!

reviews.author: Angela
reviews.text: I've had anti-wrinkle injections and Profhilo treatments before my wedding and I was over the moon with the results. I was glowing on my wedding day. 100% recommend.

reviews.author: Serena C
reviews.text: I went to Sam for my B12 injection and she put me at ease straight away. She goes the extra mile because she genuinely cares. I have all my trust in whatever treatment she suggests.
